title: Servicialo ServiceMandate
description: Explicit delegation of capability from a human principal to an AI agent. Servicialo protocol v0.8.

mandate_id.description: Unique identifier for this mandate (UUID v4).

principal_id.description: The human or organization that issues the mandate. Must reference a valid entity.

principal_type.description: The role of the issuing entity.

agent_id.description: The agent that receives the delegation.

acting_for.description: Whose interests this agent serves under this mandate. An agent cannot act for conflicting parties in the same service interaction.

context.description: Scope boundary. Format: {context_type}:{context_id}. Examples: org:mamapro, personal:barbara, order:so_abc123.

scopes.description: List of granted capabilities. Additive — deny by default.

constraints.description: Optional additional restrictions that narrow the mandate beyond its scopes.

max_actions_per_day.description: Maximum number of actions per calendar day.

ip_allowlist.description: Network-level restriction. CIDR notation or IP addresses.

require_confirmation_above.description: Actions involving amounts above this require human confirmation.

service_types.description: Restrict mandate to specific service types.

expires_at.description: When the mandate ceases to be valid. Must be after issued_at.

revoked_at.description: When the principal explicitly revoked the mandate.

metadata.description: Implementation-specific data. The protocol does not interpret this field.
